_comment: Zero-cost models — Groq free tier + Gemini free tier. No credit card needed.

_comment_keys.GROQ_API_KEY: console.groq.com → Create account → API Keys (instant, free)
_comment_keys.GEMINI_API_KEY: aistudio.google.com → Get API key (free, no billing needed)

_comment_speed: Groq runs at ~700 tok/s. Full run (per-threat=6, trials=3) takes ~20 min total.
